Port for the emulated Home Assistant ser: Port for the emulated Home Assistant server (default: 8123)
Select network interface to listen on (0: Select network interface to listen on (0.0.0.0 = all interfaces)
URL where devices will be redirected aft: URL where devices will be redirected after authentication (e.g., http://192.168.1.100:8082/vis/)
**Important:** Do not use 'localhost' or: **Important:** Do not use 'localhost' or '127.0.0.1' - use the actual IP address of your ioBroker server!
Name shown on the display during discove: Name shown on the display during discovery
Broadcast the service via mDNS so device: Broadcast the service via mDNS so devices can find it automatically (requires Avahi on Linux)
mDNS uses Avahi on Linux. Install with::
mDNS uses Avahi on Linux. Install with: `sudo apt install avahi-daemon`

If mDNS is disabled or not working, enter the URL manually on the display:
`http://YOUR_IP:8123`
If enabled, devices must enter valid cre: If enabled, devices must enter valid credentials to authenticate
Note: Authentication is optional. The di: Note: Authentication is optional. The display will always go through the authentication flow, but credentials are only validated if this option is enabled.
